name: Ministry of Education
notes: Sets education policy; oversees CNRED recognition orders and ARACIS QA standards; contact via Ministry portal.

name: CNRED (National Center for Recognition and Equivalence of Diplomas)
notes: Recognition/equivalence of foreign diplomas; EU/EEA streamlined; standard decision target 30 days once file complete.

name: ARACIS (Romanian Agency for Quality Assurance in Higher Education)
notes: External QA and accreditation for universities/programs; standards inform joint-program approvals and benchmarking.

name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs – Consular Department (Legalization Office)
notes: Legalizes Romanian documents for non-Hague states; publishes apostille guidance and country coverage lists.
